MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of Incompetent Person hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Margaret Del Coto
Appearances:
Maureen McGowan, Esq. for Petitioner: Woodrow Barlettani as guardian ad litem for Susan Barlettani, an Incompetent Claimant. The Court dispenses with the appearances of the Petitioner and the Incompetent Person, Susan Barlettani.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:

Compromise: $6,517.52
Reimbursement Costs $1,787.34 (16% of costs associated with asbestos related litigation).
Attorney's fees: $1,182.55 (payable to Brayton & Purcell).

Of the amount $3,547.63 will be deposited with the Inland Counties Master Trust, which qualifies as a Special Needs Trust under Probate Code section 3604 for the benefit of Susan Barlettani. The Court approves all terms stated by counel for future distribution at 16% to Susan Barlettani, and any and all future settlements to be deposited in the Inland Counties Master Trust. See scanned document.

Order signed in open court.
